name: Llama 3.3 70B
description: Meta's flagship open-source chat model. Strongest 70B in many benchmarks.

name: Llama 3.1 8B
description: Efficient 8B model with tool-calling support and 128K context.

name: Llama 3.2 3B
description: Compact 3B model optimized for on-device and edge inference.

name: Llama 3.2 1B
description: Smallest Llama 3 model, suitable for embedded and very constrained devices.

name: Gemma 3 27B
description: Top open-source multimodal model with vision. Strong instruction following.

name: Gemma 3 12B
description: Balanced 12B multimodal model with strong vision and text capabilities.

name: Gemma 3 4B
description: Efficient 4B multimodal model with vision. Excellent mobile candidate.

name: Gemma 3n E4B
description: Mobile-first model with novel MatFormer architecture. 4B effective params. Audio, image, text.

name: Gemma 3n E2B
description: Ultra-small 2B effective mobile model. Designed for on-device inference on mid-range hardware.

name: Phi-4
description: 14B model punching above its weight. Excellent at math and reasoning.

name: Phi-4 Mini
description: 3.8B model with strong reasoning for its size. Mobile and edge ready.

name: Qwen2.5 72B
description: 72B model with 128K context. Excellent multilingual and instruction-following.

name: Qwen2.5 7B
description: Efficient 7B model with great multilingual support and 128K context.

name: Qwen2.5-Coder 32B
description: Best open-source code model. Rivals GPT-4o on many coding benchmarks.

name: Qwen2.5-Coder 7B
description: 7B code-specialized model. Excellent for on-device code assistance.

name: Qwen3 235B-A22B
description: Flagship MoE model. 235B total, 22B active. State-of-the-art open-source performance.

name: Qwen3 30B-A3B
description: 30B MoE with only 3B active parameters. Efficient desktop inference.

name: DeepSeek R1
description: 671B MoE reasoning model. Matches o1 on AIME, MATH, coding. Groundbreaking open weights.

name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen 1.5B
description: 1.5B distilled reasoning model. On-device capable with chain-of-thought reasoning.

name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen 7B
description: 7B distilled reasoning model. Desktop on-device reasoning chain.

name: DeepSeek V3
description: 685B MoE general-purpose model. Rivals GPT-4o on many tasks at open-source cost.

name: Mistral 7B v0.3
description: Popular 7B baseline. Fast, capable, sliding window attention.

name: Mixtral 8x7B
description: Pioneering MoE model. 47B total, 13B active. Fast desktop inference.

name: Aya Expanse 32B
description: Best multilingual open model. 23 languages, 32B, strong instruction following.

name: Whisper Large v3
description: State-of-the-art open ASR model. 99 languages. 1.5B params, desktop-friendly.

name: SmolLM2 1.7B
description: Tiny but surprisingly capable model from HF. Excellent mobile baseline.

name: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
description: 22M embedding model. Fastest sentence embedding, used in RAG/memory pipelines.

name: GPT-4o
description: Flagship multimodal model. Strong across text, vision, audio. API only.

name: GPT-4o Mini
description: Cost-efficient GPT-4-class model. Best value proprietary option.

name: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
description: Best Claude model for coding, reasoning and extended thinking. API only.

name: Claude 3.5 Haiku
description: Fastest and most affordable Claude model. Great for high-volume tasks.

name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
description: Top Google model with 1M context window. Best for long documents and analysis.

name: Gemini 2.0 Flash
description: Fast, capable and affordable. Strong multimodal with real-time capabilities.

name: Grok 3
description: xAI's frontier model with DeepSearch and web access. Strong STEM performance.

name: Falcon 180B
description: Largest fully open (Apache 2.0) dense model as of 2023. Datacenter scale.

name: InternVL2.5 8B
description: Excellent vision-language model at 8B. Strong on document understanding.

name: Flux.1 Dev
description: Top open-source image generation model. 12B params. Exceptional quality.

name: Llama 3.2 11B Vision
description: First multimodal Llama — processes images and text. Fits on high-end mobile devices with 16GB RAM.

name: Phi-3 Mini 3.8B
description: High-capability small model trained on high-quality synthetic data. 128K context with excellent reasoning for its size.

name: Phi-3.5 Mini
description: Updated Phi-3 Mini with improved multilingual support and stronger instruction following. 128K context.

name: Gemma 2 2B
description: Lightweight Gemma 2 model with knowledge distillation from larger models. Punches above its weight.

name: Gemma 3 1B
description: Ultra-compact Gemma 3 model designed for edge and embedded deployment.

name: TinyLlama 1.1B
description: Trained on 3T tokens with minimal compute. Remarkably capable for 1.1B parameters.

name: SmolLM2 360M
description: Smallest viable production LLM. Excellent for constrained embedded devices.

name: Qwen2.5 0.5B
description: Ultra-compact Qwen model for extremely resource-constrained environments. 32K context.

name: Qwen2.5 1.5B
description: Small but capable Qwen model with 32K context. Good balance for mobile deployment.

name: Qwen2.5 3B
description: Compact 3B Qwen model with 32K context. Suitable for mobile devices.

name: OLMo 1B
description: Fully open model including training data (Dolma), code, and logs. Transparency benchmark.

name: Falcon 1B
description: Compact open-source model from TII. Fully open Apache 2.0 license for commercial use.

name: OpenELM 1.1B
description: Apple open model with layer-wise scaling. Fully open including training code and logs.

name: OpenELM 3B
description: Apple's larger open model with layer-wise scaling architecture. Good performance for 3B parameters.

name: MiniCPM 2B
description: Exceptional benchmark performance for its size. Often matches 7B models.

name: MiniCPM 3B
description: Updated MiniCPM with 32K context and improved reasoning. Rivals much larger models on benchmarks.

name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama 8B
description: DeepSeek R1 reasoning distilled into Llama-3 8B base. Strong math and chain-of-thought.

name: Llama 3.1 70B
description: Best open-source 70B. Strong reasoning, multilingual, tool use. Fits on Mac Studio 96GB with Q4.

name: Llama 3.1 405B
description: Largest open-source dense model. Competes with GPT-4o on many benchmarks.

name: Phi-3 Medium 14B
description: Phi-3 medium model with 128K context. Excellent reasoning and instruction following for 14B class.

name: Phi-4 Reasoning 14B
description: Phi-4 fine-tuned with chain-of-thought reasoning. Matches much larger models on math/science.

name: Mistral Nemo 12B
description: 128K context, multilingual, Tekken tokenizer. Joint release with NVIDIA.

name: Mistral Small 3.0 22B
description: Compact but powerful 22B model from Mistral. Strong coding and reasoning with Apache 2.0 license.

name: Gemma 2 9B
description: Mid-size Gemma 2 model with knowledge distillation. Strong coding and math performance.

name: Gemma 2 27B
description: Largest Gemma 2 model. Competitive with much larger models due to knowledge distillation.

name: Qwen2.5 14B
description: Strong mid-size Qwen model with 128K context. Good balance of capability and resource requirements.

name: Qwen2.5 32B
description: Large Qwen2.5 model with excellent multilingual capabilities and 128K context window.

name: Qwen2.5-Coder 14B
description: 14B code-specialized model with 128K context. Strong HumanEval scores and multi-language support.

name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen 14B
description: DeepSeek R1 reasoning distilled into Qwen-14B base. Excellent math and science reasoning.

name: DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen 32B
description: Best desktop reasoning model. Nearly matches full DeepSeek R1 on math benchmarks.

name: Yi 1.5 9B
description: Updated Yi model with improved instruction following and coding. Competitive with Llama 3 8B.

name: Yi 1.5 34B
description: Large Yi model with strong multilingual capabilities. Good for complex reasoning tasks.

name: Falcon 7B
description: Compact open-source Falcon model with strong English and French performance. Fully open Apache 2.0.

name: WizardLM-2 7B
description: Strong instruction-tuned model with complex reasoning capabilities. Good at multi-turn conversation.

name: SOLAR 10.7B
description: Depth up-scaling (DUS) architecture. Punches well above weight for 10B class.

name: Orca 2 13B
description: Smaller models taught to reason with diverse strategies. Strong on reasoning tasks.

name: LLaVA 1.6 Mistral 7B
description: Strong open vision-language model built on Mistral 7B.

name: LLaVA 1.6 Vicuna 13B
description: Larger LLaVA model built on Vicuna 13B. Strong image understanding and visual question answering.

name: Zephyr 7B Beta
description: DPO/RLHF fine-tune of Mistral 7B. Excellent chat quality and instruction following.

name: GLM-4 9B
description: Supports up to 1M token context. Strong on Chinese. THUDM research group.

name: InternLM 2.5 7B
description: Supports up to 1M token context via LongLoRA. Strong Chinese and English bilingual performance.

name: InternLM 2.5 20B
description: Large InternLM model with 1M context support. Strong reasoning and tool use.

name: EXAONE 3.5 7.8B
description: Exceptional Korean + English bilingual model. Top coding performance for its size.

name: CodeLlama 7B
description: Code-specialized Llama model with fill-in-the-middle and instruction following for code tasks.

name: CodeLlama 13B
description: Larger CodeLlama with improved multi-language coding capabilities and FIM support.

name: DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite 16B
description: MoE code model: 16B total but only 2.4B active per token. HumanEval 81.1%.

name: StarCoder2 7B
description: Strong code model trained on 600+ programming languages. Fill-in-the-middle support.

name: StarCoder2 15B
description: Flagship StarCoder2 model. Best open code completion for 15B class. 600+ languages.

name: Command R 35B
description: RAG-optimized model. Built-in grounded generation, tool use, and multilingual support.

name: Vicuna 13B v1.5
description: Popular early chat fine-tune of Llama 2. Good conversational ability for its age.

name: Neural Chat 7B v3.3
description: Intel-optimized chat model fine-tuned for x86 CPU and GPU inference. DPO-trained on Mistral 7B.

name: Codestral 22B
description: Best open code model with fill-in-the-middle (FIM) support. HumanEval 81.1%.

name: Marco-o1 7B
description: o1-style chain-of-thought reasoning in 7B form factor. Strong on complex problem solving.

name: Mistral Large 2 123B
description: Mistral's flagship open-weight model. Competitive with GPT-4 class on many benchmarks.

name: Mixtral 8x22B
description: Large MoE model. Strong on coding and reasoning. 141B total, 39.1B active parameters.

name: Yi 34B
description: 200K context with RoPE scaling extension. Strong multilingual. One of the best 34B class models.

name: Falcon 40B
description: Mid-tier Falcon model. Large context and strong general performance on Apache 2.0 license.

name: Command R+ 104B
description: Best open RAG model at scale. 10-language multilingual. Advanced tool use.

name: BLOOM 176B
description: First massively multilingual open LLM. 46 languages. Historic landmark in open AI research.

name: GPT-NeoX 20B
description: EleutherAI's landmark model. Fully open including training data and code.

name: Grok-1 314B
description: Elon Musk's xAI open-sourced model weights. Massive MoE. First publicly released xAI model.

name: DBRX 132B
description: Fine-grained MoE with 16 experts. Strong coding and math benchmarks.

name: Nemotron-4 340B
description: Used to generate synthetic training data for other models. Aligned with HelpSteer2.

name: Gemini Nano 1
description: On-device model for Pixel 8 Pro. Powers Smart Reply, Summarization via Android AICore. First on-device Google LLM.

name: Gemini Nano 2
description: Pixel 9 series on-device model. Multimodal text+image. Runs via Android AICore API.

name: Apple Intelligence
description: A17 Pro+ / M1+ required. Runs locally for most tasks, escalates complex queries to Private Cloud Compute. Powers Siri, writing tools, image generation.
pricing: Free (requires iPhone 15 Pro+ or M1+ Mac)

name: Samsung Gauss Mobile
description: On-device model in Galaxy S24 series. Email composing, translation, live chat assist.

name: o1
description: Extended reasoning model with internal chain-of-thought. Best for STEM, math, and coding.

name: o3
description: Next-generation reasoning. Set ARC-AGI record. Best open-ended problem solving.

name: o4-mini
description: Compact reasoning model with strong performance on coding and STEM tasks at lower cost.

name: Claude 3 Opus
description: Anthropic's highest capability model. Strongest on complex analysis and nuanced writing.

name: Claude Sonnet 4
description: claude-sonnet-4-6 model ID. Improved coding, reasoning, and agentic task performance over 3.5.

name: Claude Opus 4
description: claude-opus-4-7 model ID. Anthropic frontier model for the most complex tasks.

name: Gemini 1.5 Pro
description: 2M token context window — record for production APIs. Multimodal with video understanding.

name: Gemini 1.5 Flash
description: Fast, cost-efficient Gemini model with 1M context and multimodal capabilities.

name: Grok 2
description: Integrated with X (Twitter). Real-time web access. Strong on current events.

name: Mistral Large (API)
description: Best Mistral API model. Multilingual, function calling, JSON mode.

name: Amazon Nova Pro
description: Amazon's frontier multimodal model. Available on AWS Bedrock.

name: Amazon Nova Lite
description: Cost-efficient multimodal model from AWS Bedrock. Low latency for everyday tasks.

name: Amazon Nova Micro
description: Ultra-fast text-only model. Lowest latency in the Nova family.

name: Jamba 1.5 Large
description: Hybrid SSM-Transformer (Mamba+attention). Efficient long-context inference.

name: Sonar Pro
description: Real-time web search augmented LLM. Best for queries requiring current knowledge.

name: Command R+ (API)
description: RAG specialist. Multi-step tool use. 10-language multilingual. Retrieval-augmented generation.
